# HYPE

> India's first live auction marketplace for sneakers, apparel, and hype-culture collectibles. Every lot is HYPE-Verified.

HYPE runs real-time auctions and fixed-price Buy Now drops. Buyers bid live on authenticated sneakers and streetwear; sellers list inventory through a verified intake flow.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live auction highlights, ending-soon drops, and the HYPE story.
- [Shop](/shop): Buy Now and fixed-price listings from HYPE-verified sellers.
- [Auctions](/auctions): Browse live, upcoming, and ending-soon auctions.
- [Live Auctions](/auctions/live): Auctions currently accepting bids.
- [Ending Soon](/auctions/ending-soon): Auctions closing within the hour.
- [Upcoming](/auctions/upcoming): Drops scheduled to go live.
- [Sell with HYPE](/sell): Apply to consign sneakers and streetwear.
- [About](/about): What HYPE is and how authentication works.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the HYPE team.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Delivery timelines and tracking.
- [Returns](/returns): Return policy for authenticated lots.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
